quote: The student performed very well in organizing the research process – from developing the study concept, through selecting appropriate research tools, to the reliable analysis of the obtained results.
longQuote: The student performed very well in organizing the research process – from developing the study concept, through selecting appropriate research tools, to the reliable analysis of the obtained results. Throughout our collaboration, she demonstrated consistency, punctuality, and openness to feedback, which significantly contributed to the high quality of the final thesis.
name: Katarzyna Nawrot-Porąbka, PhD
role: Department of Medical Physiology · Institute of Physiotherapy, Jagiellonian University Medical College
